title: anthyllis polycephala var. podocephala
intro: Anthyllis polycephala var. podocephala, also known as kidney vetch, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, kidney vetch has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing symptoms of menopause, alleviating anxiety and stress, and supporting kidney and urinary health. Kidney vetch is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
